title: No Bloat
description: A performance modpack without the bloat
body:
A performance modpack without the bloat installed. I created this since I didn't want to have to keep manually installing the same mods each time I created a new instance, and all performance packs included mods that were unnecessary for performance.
Mod Summary
  • Cloth Config v15 by shedaniel
  • Dynamic FPS by juliand665, LostLuma
  • Enhanced Block Entities by FoundationGames
  • EntityCulling by tr7zw
  • Fabric API by FabricMC
  • Fabric Language Kotlin by FabricMC
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • ImmediatelyFast by RK_01
  • Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
  • Lithium by JellySquid, 2No2Name
  • MixinTrace by comp500
  • Mod Menu by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
  • ModernFix by embeddedt
  • More Culling by FX - PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
  • Noxesium by Noxcrew
  • Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
  • Sodium by JellySquid (jellysquid3)
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
